Title: Authorizes and empowers each municipality of the state and the department of transportation to implement a program for imposing fines for littering using photo violation-monitoring systems
Summary: Authorizes and empowers each municipality of the state and the department of transportation to implement a program for imposing fines for littering using photo violation-monitoring systems.
LawCode: Amd §1220, V & T L; amd §87, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to authorizing and empowering each municipality of the state and the department of transportation to implement a program for imposing fines for littering using photo violation-monitoring systems; and to amend the public officers law, in relation to accessing records
